title: ed25519/curve25519: public_key unsafe blocks missing SAFETY comment
description: In src/crypto/ed25519.rs (Ed25519Key::public_key, line 37) and src/crypto/curve25519.rs (Curve25519Key::public_key, line 37), the unsafe blocks have no SAFETY comment. Every other unsafe block in those files and in rsa.rs/ecc.rs has a SAFETY annotation. A contributor auditing unsafe code will notice the asymmetry and either assume the invariant is obvious (it isn't — ctx_ptr lifetime must be valid) or add a boilerplate comment without understanding it. Add consistent SAFETY comments.
